texto: Boys are given the universe in which to carve out their identities, the promise of infinite space for them to expand into and contract upon. Girls are allowed only enough room to be stars, and they must twinkle, twinkle if they want anyone to pay attention to them.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Clementine Ford sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “Boys are given the universe in which to carve out their identities, the promise of infinite space…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sucesso, attention, clem-ford, útil em momentos de clem-ford e clemford.

frase_original: Boys are given the universe in which to carve out their identities, the promise of infinite space for them to expand into and contract upon. Girls are allowed only enough room to be stars, and they must twinkle, twinkle if they want anyone to pay attention to them.

texto: There is evidence that I have survived this before, that I will go on surviving. There is love. There is love. There is love. Maybe the Cheshire cat was right. Maybe we are all a little mad. And if we are all in this together, then none of us are truly alone. That means me. But it also means you. Across these pages, I reach out to you, dear one whose heart feels so alone. This too shall pass. And we will all be okay.
explicacao: Citação de Clementine Ford sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “There is evidence that I have survived this before, that I will go on surviving. There is love. T…” articula amor, anxiety, depression em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como depression.

Across these pages, I reach out to you, dear one whose heart feels so alone. This too shall pass. And we will all be okay.

texto: -no matter what we do, we'll never succeed in attaining the 'perfect' body or the 'perfect' face. This isn't just because perfection is an unattainable goal; it's because capitalism relies on people being constantly unhappy so it can keep selling us the promise that consumerism will make our lives better.
explicacao: Citação de Clementine Ford sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “-no matter what we do, we'll never succeed in attaining the 'perfect' body or the 'perfect' face.…” articula reflexao, capitalism, perfect em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
